title: Trees, Traversals, and Binary Search Trees · Cost-Model Clinic: Tree Vocabulary
summary: Index hierarchical records and ordered keys with explicit structural invariants. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dsa tree vocabulary increment in a traversable search tree with validity checks. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Distinguish root, edge, parent, child, ancestor, depth, height, leaf, and subtree.
Generate empty, singleton, duplicate, extreme, and impossible-target cases.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
